Objective: Complete all on-chain instructions so the program can be deployed to devnet by end of day
User locks SOL in vault · creates Intent PDA
Solver pairs FOR + AGAINST intents · creates MatchPair PDA
Verify commitment reveal · release SOL from vault
· intents (intent_pda, market_pda, wallet, side, amount, matched)
End of Day: anchor build + deploy to devnet
Copy IDL → packages/sdk/idl/ · Update program ID everywhere
anchor test passes all 5 instructions locally · anchor deploy --provider.cluster devnet succeeds · IDL copied to packages/sdk
Backend Workers — SSE Streams + Settlement Engine
Objective: Live score events flowing into your backend, automatic market creation, settlement trigger wired up
Use polling for fixtures today (simple, reliable). Use SSE for scores (required for live settlement).
Odds stream: skip for MVP — display snapshot odds only.
1. Listens to SETTLE event from scores worker
2. Load markets for fixtureId from DB

match_pairs (pair_pda, market_pda, maker_intent, taker_intent, matched_amount, claimed) · settlements (market_pda, tx_sig, outcome, seq_used, settled_at) · score_events (fixture_id, seq, action, confirmed, payload)
SSE stream connects + prints events to console
Fixture worker creates 3 markets on devnet for a real WC fixture · Scores SSE prints live events to console · Manual settlement test passes with historical fixtureId 18172489
Objective: Frontend can read markets, place a bet, and see it matched. Full on-chain flow tested end-to-end.
MarketCreated → upsert markets row in DB
IntentPlaced → upsert intents row · update market.total_for / total_against
MatchExecuted → upsert match_pairs · update intent matched/remaining
Returns markets from DB (no RPC calls)
User intent history · matched status · claimable winnings
Use fixtureId 18172489 (Brazil vs Japan, June 29 — in historical window). This is your demo fixture. Run this test 3 times until it's rock solid.
Full E2E sequence above completes in a script · GET /markets returns real market data · DB shows correct settled outcome
Objective: Working web app. User can connect wallet, browse markets, place a bet, watch live events, claim winnings.
All 4 screens render real data · Wallet connects + signs place_intent successfully · Demo replay mode runs full flow end-to-end in browser
Objective: Deployed, recorded, submitted. This day is non-negotiable — reserve the full day.
· apps/api → Railway (connect GitHub, set env vars)
· Anchor program → already on devnet from Day 1
· Verify TXLINE_JWT + TXLINE_API_TOKEN in Railway env
· Local setup: bun install → bun dev (under 5 commands)
30 seconds: diagram of TxLINE → CPI → Anchor
App live on Vercel URL · Video uploaded to Loom/YouTube · GitHub repo public · Superteam Earn submission complete
Once per market open · display only
Endpoints NOT needed for MVP: /fixtures/updates · /fixtures/validation · /odds/stream · /odds/updates · /scores/updates (time window) · Batch validation
